name: Atatus
description: Atatus — Performance Monitoring / APM tool for developers. Specializes in application monitoring.

seo.title: Atatus Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Atatus analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Performance Monitoring / APM.

review.verdict: Best for microservices performance monitoring. Atatus offers custom pricing.
pros: Deep integrations across the observability stack
cons: Per-host / per-seat billing grows fast with team size
